summary: Tested iOS QR/Barcode Scanner implementation for BidBlitz Payment Platform. All backend APIs working correctly (20/21 tests passed). Frontend iOS scanner elements verified: hidden camera inputs (#ios-native-camera-input, #ios-topup-camera-input) with capture='environment' attribute present. iOS detection logic correctly implemented using /iPad|iPhone|iPod/.test(navigator.userAgent). Manual barcode entry fallback working. Full topup flow tested successfully.

minor.issue: Zero amount payment (€0) is accepted instead of being rejected with 400/422

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ iOS detection logic correctly implemented: /iPad|iPhone|iPod/.test(navigator.userAgent) || (navigator.platform === 'MacIntel' && navigator.maxTouchPoints > 1)
✓ Hidden iOS native camera inputs present: #ios-native-camera-input (payment), #ios-topup-camera-input (topup)
✓ capture='environment' attribute correctly set on file inputs for rear camera access
✓ handlePaymentPhotoUpload function (lines 1722-1759) uses Html5Qrcode.scanFile() for QR code scanning from photo
✓ handleTopupPhotoUpload function (lines 1882-1920) uses Html5Qrcode.scanFile() for barcode scanning from photo
✓ iOS branch triggers native camera input click instead of html5-qrcode live scanner
✓ Android/Desktop branch uses html5-qrcode live scanner as before
✓ Manual barcode/QR code input available as fallback for all platforms
✓ Backend supports all QR formats: BIDBLITZ:2.0:xxx, BIDBLITZ-PAY:xxx, cpt_xxx, BID-XXXXXX

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements verified, topup flow working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: iOS scanner implementation verified. Key elements: #ios-native-camera-input (payment), #ios-topup-camera-input (topup). iOS detection: /iPad|iPhone|iPod/.test(navigator.userAgent). Backend supports QR formats: BIDBLITZ:2.0:xxx, BIDBLITZ-PAY:xxx, cpt_xxx. Manual entry fallback available.

handlePaymentPhotoUpload.uses: Html5Qrcode.scanFile() for QR code scanning from photo

handleTopupPhotoUpload.uses: Html5Qrcode.scanFile() for barcode scanning from photo

manual_input_fallback.description: Manual barcode/QR code entry available for all platforms

api_tests_summary.failure_details: test_payment_amount_validation - Zero amount payment accepted (minor issue)
